prompt: Edit image 1: Overlay a pixelated game Heads-Up Display (HUD) at the bottom of the screen. Design the HUD using the layout and information elements (like health, ammo, armor) from image 2's classic style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Overlay a pixelated game Heads-Up Display (HUD) across the entire bottom edge of the screen. Design this HUD to mimic the classic pixel-art style, layout, and information elements (such as health percentage, ammo count, armor percentage, and a central character portrait) found in image 2.
objects: Background scene from Image 1 (Geralt, horse, landscape, sky)
HUD positioned across the entire bottom edge of the screen
